Notice Of Motion To Lift Stay Of Litigation
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK BYRNE & ATTY. VIVIAN LEUNG LEROHE OF TRIAND & BYRNE, TEL. NO. 680-5731 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CALEY M. HEEKIN OF PAUL HASTINGS LLP, TEL. NO. 856-7026 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL C. HARGROVE DBA MICHAEL C. HARGROVE CONSTRUCTION'S Motion To Lift Stay Of Litigation is Denied. As held by this Court in February 2012, the parties agreed to contractual arbitration and all of Plaintiff's claims are subject to that arbitration agreement. The Court declines to essentially vacate that Order and reassert jurisdiction over this matter. California has a "strong public policy favoring contractual arbitration." (MKJA Inc. v. Fit Franchising LLC (2011) 191 Cal.App.4th 643, 661.) If the parties are unable to agree on a new arbitrator, either party may file a motion for the Court to appoint one, pursuant to CCP sec. 1281.6. The parties are ordered to complete the arbitration within nine months of entry of this Order. (See Bosworth v. Whitmore (2006) 135 Cal.App.4th 536, 550, holding that the Court may set a completion date.) Plaintiff's request for attorney's fees, raised for the first time in reply, is denied. Arbitrator to be hired and arbitration is set within 30 days. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =(302/EHG)
